message:
feat(core): implement HTTP Digest authentication (RFC 7616 / RFC 2617)

Add a self-contained Digest auth module (bd-gl3v) with:

- DigestAlgorithm enum: MD5, MD5-sess, SHA-256, SHA-256-sess
- Local MD5 and SHA-256 implementations to avoid external crypto deps
- DigestChallenge: generates WWW-Authenticate challenge headers
  with configurable realm, nonce, opaque, qop, and algorithm
- DigestCredentials: parses Authorization: Digest ... headers
- Response hash computation (HA1, HA2, request-digest) per RFC 7616
- DigestVerifier: validates client responses against stored passwords
  with nonce-count replay protection
- constant_time_eq comparison for timing-safe verification

581 lines with comprehensive unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
